description: Diggersby strips opponent shields with fast Scorching Sands spam, then Aegislash sweeps unshielded with Shadow Ball and Gyro Ball. Explicitly highlighted across multiple games — even when Diggersby loses switch advantage, getting shields down is described as 'all going according to plan' for Aegislash.

sources.author: HomeSliceHenry
sources.videoTitle: HIDE YOUR FORRETRESS! *BUFFED* Mud Shot Diggersby is on the hunt | Pokémon GO Battle League
